mapper.select: SELECT id, url_pattern, http_method, descr, sort_order, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by FROM resources ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO resources (url_pattern, http_method, descr, sort_order, created_at, created_by) VALUES (#{urlPattern}, #{httpMethod}, #{descr}, #{sortOrder}, #{createdAt}, #{createdBy})
mapper.select: SELECT id, parent_id, name, url, icon, sort_order, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by FROM menus ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO menus (parent_id, name, url, icon, sort_order, created_at, created_by) VALUES (#{parentId}, #{name}, #{url}, #{icon}, #{sortOrder}, #{createdAt}, #{createdBy})
mapper.select: SELECT id, role_name AS roleName, descr FROM roles ORDER BY id
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM role_resources WHERE role_id=#{roleId} AND resource_id=#{resourceId}
DELETE FROM role_menus WHERE role_id=#{roleId} AND menu_id=#{menuId}
